title: betula lenta var. genuina
intro: Betula lenta var. genuina, also known as American black cherry, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America, characterized by its dark red to black bark and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Betula lenta var. genuina include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of using Betula lenta var. genuina include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Betula lenta var. genuina can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
